column8: 'Has your brother gone out?' Mum asked me.Mum asked me if my brother_____________out.
column9: 'Do you know the answer?' Miss Smith asked Ruby.Miss Smith asked Ruby if she______________the answer.
column10: 'Is this your car?' the police officer said to the man. The police officer asked the man if it__________his car.
column11: 'Have you been to see the exhibition?' I asked Benjamin. I asked Benjamin if he_______________to see the exhibition.
column12: 'Does your laptop need a new battery?' Jerry asked me. Jerry asked me if my laptop______________a new battery.
column13: 'Are you having barbecue?' I asked the Browns. I asked the Browns if they______________a berbecue.
